ValidationRule.description: The Check-in Date must be within 30 days of the Postponement Start Date prior to actual postponement
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(ISBLANK(SaaS_Postponed_Start_Date__c)), NOT(ISPICKVAL( SaaS_Onboarding_Status__c, "Postponed")), ISCHANGED(SaaS_Postponed_Check_In_Date__c), OR( ((SaaS_Postponed_Check_In_Date__c - SaaS_Postponed_Start_Date__c) >30), ((SaaS_Postponed_Check_In_Date__c - SaaS_Postponed_Start_Date__c) <0) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: SaaS Postponed Check-in Date must be within 30 days of the SaaS Postponed Start Date
